---
class-title: "Class Plan Template"
class-subtitle: "Copy and rename this file for each new class plan. Fill in the YAML fields, module cards, and Class Plan Guide section below."
toc: false
---

```{=html}

<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/bootstrap-icons/1.10.5/font/bootstrap-icons.min.css">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="../../project_classplan_style.css">

<div class="container">
    <!-- Header Section -->
    <header class="class-plan-header">
        <p class="tagline">Class Plan</p>
        <h2>{{< meta class-title >}}</h2>
        <p class="subtitle">{{< meta class-subtitle >}}</p>
    </header>

    <!-- Curriculum Modules Section -->
    <!-- Add one <div class="card"> block per module -->
    <div class="modules-section">
        <h3 class="section-heading">Curriculum Modules</h3>
        <div class="modules-grid">

            <!-- Module 1 -->
            <div class="card">
                <a href="#" class="module-card-title">
                    Module Title
                </a>
                <ul class="details-list">
                    <li>
                        <i class="bi bi-person-fill icon"></i>
                        <div><strong>Author:</strong> Author Name</div>
                    </li>
                    <li>
                        <i class="bi bi-pc-display icon"></i>
                        <div><strong>Tool:</strong> Python / R / Stata</div>
                    </li>
                    <li>
                        <i class="bi bi-person-workspace icon"></i>
                        <div><strong>Audience:</strong> Undergraduate (Introductory)</div>
                    </li>
                    <li>
                        <i class="bi bi-clock-fill icon"></i>
                        <div><strong>Estimated Time:</strong> 1-hour class session</div>
                    </li>
                </ul>
                <p class="module-description">Brief description of what this module covers.</p>
            </div>

            <!-- Add more module cards here as needed -->

        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Related Resources -->
    <div class="card">
        <h3 class="card-title">Related Resources</h3>
        <div class="resource-buttons-horizontal">
            <a href="../projects/project_TITLE.html" class="btn btn-project">
                <i class="bi bi-info-circle-fill icon"></i> View Project Page
            </a>
            <a href="../datasets/data_TITLE.html" class="btn btn-dataset">
               <i class="bi bi-clipboard-data-fill icon"></i> Explore the Dataset
            </a>
        </div>
    </div>

</div>
```

::::: card
:::: lesson-guide-card
## Class Plan Guide {.main-title}

### <i class="bi bi-bullseye icon"></i> Learning Objectives

-   Objective 1
-   Objective 2
-   Objective 3

### <i class="bi bi-card-list icon"></i> Class Outline

**Part 1: Introduction & Context**

Description of the introduction

**Part 2: Guided Activity**

Description of the main activity

**Part 3: Discussion & Wrap-up**

Description of the conclusion

### <i class="bi bi-pencil-square icon"></i> Assignment

::: assignment-box
Your task is to...

Your assignment must include:

-   Requirement 1
-   Requirement 2
:::
::::
:::::
